findings.detail: Persistent dashboard data mismatch (flag-aether-001) firing every 15 min since ~22:44Z. 3 duplicate flags per cycle (noise). Local ts consistently behind API ts. PNL drifting: -$11.8 to -$8.28. Dashboard sync mechanism broken.
No newsletter produced for 2026-04-12 or 2026-04-13. Multiple flags and auto-remediate tasks delegated but none resolved root cause. Ra output dir still only has 2026-04-11 edition.
Sam produced no log output on 2026-04-13. 6 P1 tasks assigned but no evidence of autonomous work. Multiple tasks show bare DELEGATED status with no method or result.
Many In Progress tasks show only sim-ack handshake as method — confirms communication but not actual remediation. nel-001 (P0: security dir gitignore) in this state 4+ hours.
Aether logs 3 identical P2 flags per 15-min cycle to log.jsonl. Likely loop bug in aether runner. Should deduplicate.
